# SOURCE-DMM: Digital Marketing Manuscript
> **Pessoa:** Jeremy Haynes
> **Programa:** Digital Marketing Manuscript (DMM)
> **Tipo:** Course (8 phases + 4 bonus modules)
> **Arquivos:** 91 files | 623KB total
> **Data Processamento:** 2026-03-22
> **Pipeline:** Jarvis Full Auto (Opus)
> **Elementos Extraidos:** 125 (FIL:25, MM:20, HEU:35, FRM:25, MET:20)

---

## ESTRUTURA DO PROGRAMA

| Fase | Nome | Arquivos | Bytes | Domínios |
|------|------|----------|-------|----------|
| Phase 1 | Clarity & Understanding | 1 | 7KB | mindset, self-education |
| Phase 3 | Products & Services | 11 | 133KB | agency-ops, pricing, packaging, client-management, legal |
| Phase 4 | Sales & Lead Generation | 9 | 37KB | sales, objection-handling, prospecting, follow-up |
| Phase 5 | Operations | 5 | 17KB | operations, decision-making, KPIs |
| Phase 6 | Delivery | 3 | 18KB | delivery, team-structure, speed |
| Phase 7 | Expansion & Team Building | 11 | 115KB | hiring, firing, compensation, culture, leadership |
| Phase 8 | Advanced Tips & Strategy | 2 | 12KB | agency-marketing, personal-branding, lifestyle |
| Bonus: Profit & Prosper | Mindset | 9 | 51KB | mindset, philosophies, mental models |
| Bonus: How To Start | Startup | 6+4 stubs | 24KB | startup, financing, legal setup |
| Bonus: Resources | Templates | 14 | 53KB | pitch decks, playbooks, email templates |
| Bonus: Legal | Agreements | 15 | 156KB | contracts, NDAs, operating agreements |

Note: Phase 2 absent from source material.

---

## TOP FRAMEWORKS EXTRAÍDOS

1. **Battle Plan Blueprint** (6-step: Strategize→Design→Optimize→Develop→Deploy→Analyze)
2. **6 Conditions of Statistics** (Non-Existence→Danger→Emergency→Normal→Affluence→Power)
3. **Profit First** (Sales - Profit = Expenses)
4. **CPR Framework** (Clear Process to Revenue)
5. **5-Tier Pricing Pyramid** ($1K→$16K/month)
6. **Omnipresent Advertising Model**
7. **Core Content Model** (1 pillar→5-10 micro-content)
8. **3-Phase Interview Process** (Behavioral→Aptitude→Test Week)
9. **Milestone Agreement System** (2-Day Approval Windows)
10. **MARK Core Values** (Mastery, Articulation, Results, Creativity)

| Speaker | Papel | Contribuição |
|---------|-------|-------------|
| Jeremy Haynes | Primary (100%) | All phases and bonus content |

## NOTAS DE PROCESSAMENTO

- 7 stub files (49 bytes each) — PDF cover pages with no content, ignored
- 3 near-duplicate email templates (cold/warm/ecom) — extracted once
- 15 legal templates — low DNA value but high operational value as agency templates
- Phase 2 absent from source material (possibly doesn't exist in the course)
- 6 Conditions of Statistics framework originates from L. Ron Hubbard business technology (via Grant Cardone office)
